summary: A deterministic raw-registry extracted-zip protocol fixture now pins preflight parity between a live seeded vault and a full zip roundtrip with exported registry state.

observations.problem: External review findings referred to extracted-zip raw-registry mismatches, but the repo lacked a deterministic fixture that distinguished a healthy live seeded vault from the same vault after a full zip roundtrip including exported registry state.
observations.why_it_matters: Without a reproducible extracted-zip protocol, future raw-registry mismatch claims are hard to classify as live-tree regressions, extraction-only drift, or environment-specific observations.
observations.automation_candidate: Archive a seeded vault after writing ops/raw-registry.json, extract it into a clean directory, and assert that raw_registry_preflight returns the same pass-state report before and after the roundtrip.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-04-28: raw-registry preflight tests now build ops/raw-registry.json, zip the seeded vault, extract it, and assert exact preflight report parity so extracted-zip reproduction remains deterministic.
